user_prompt: On a coordinate plane, draw a directed line segment from point A at (1, 1) to point B at (7, 5). I need to find the point P that is 1/3 of the way from A to B. Draw auxiliary horizontal and vertical dashed lines from A and B to make a right triangle, labeling the right angle corner as C at (7, 1). Show that the horizontal distance AC = 6 and vertical distance BC = 4. Mark point P on segment AB at 1/3 of the way and label its coordinates. Draw dashed lines from P showing how it relates to 1/3 of the horizontal and vertical distances.
